entry.title: SAC Thresholds, Compare to measure missing
entry.content:
Hi

Within a story I am trying to apply a threshold on a measure to apply conditional formatting depending on its value compared to another.

When creating  a threshold from the ribbon menu I can only create account based thresholds, I believe due to the model containing an account dimension. To get round this I select the measure header in a table and from the context menu (from right clicking) select thresholds here this allows a measure threshold but this does not allows a threshold where the measure is compared to another measure as shown below.

 

I should see this

entry.title: Re: Change created own overhead rate in costing sheet
entry.content:
Hi,

you cannot change the dependency when entering the overhead rate. You must delete the line and re-enter the correct dependency with the overhead rate, as each dependency has specific fields for the overhead rate.

Best regards,

Katerina

entry.title: Process not found Error - Build Process Automation Form
entry.content:
Hallo All

I have the issue below in both my trial account and development systems.

I have created an approval form and am trying to make changes to the notification form.

entry.title: Is it possible to create hierarchy variables in Datasphere/Analytical Model?
entry.content:
Dear all,

 

May I ask you if you have found a possibility to create variables containing hierarchies in SAP Datasphere? 
Users need to be able to select hierarchy nodes in SAC prompts - Otherwise they have to select hundreds of single values.

Thank you
Timo

entry.title: Instructor-led with online content - online content "preview" only
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have an instructor-led with online content item that is not working as expected. 

The expectation is that an employee registers for a class requiring approval, and after the approval they can access the online content. However, the online content section of the item details still only shows "content preview" for employees who are approved and actively enrolled in the class. 

"Unregistered User can Access Online Content" is off 
"Content available only during specified time slot of a class" is off
"Content is available for launch (available for users)" is on 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Instructor-led with online content - online content "preview" only
entry.content:
Also, at the content object level, "content object is active" is checked, and "content object is online" is checked.

If I duplicate the item as online only, the content is available and launches correctly.

entry.title: Secure 2.0 Section 603 Multiple Savings Plans
entry.content: We have a 401k plan and a 457 plan, and employees are allowed to contribute the maximum to both. The 457 plan has to consider both the EE contribution and the ER contribution when reaching the maximum ($23500) before catch-up can be triggered. All is working correctly currently, but when I ran some test cases for Section 603 requirements, the catch-up contribution for the 457 plan continues until the EE contribution reaches the maximum (not considering the ER contribution as it should). The 401k catch-up stops as expected based on how I have table VV_T5F99K2_US_BN603 configured. I think the issue is that we do not have the 457 plan marked as a Qualified Plan in V_5UBA_C. We are not able to mark both plans as Qualified Plans because our employees are allowed to contribute the maximum to both. If I mark them both as Qualified, the system considers the EE 401k plus the EE 457 when reaching the maximum, and that won't work for us. Does anyone have a recommendation as to how to meet the requirements of Section 603?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere External Access Overview: APIs, CLI and SQL
entry.content:
Great job! One thing that drove me crazy with the CLI:

datasphere login

assumes you have chrome installed. If not, it will fail and you will not see why.

Use

datasphere login --browser edge

to make it work!

entry.title: FM (or other ways) to read layout input-field content from COOIS tcode
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I searched into the forum without any success on this topic.

In my scenario I saved a variant in COOIS  list / Operations, let's say V1, which contains some selection-input filters (MRP personnel, plant, etc). Other than this, I also saved a layout using selection screen input field, let's say L1, containing some filters which will apply on my alv ouput, in specific I filtered only operation 0025 and 0035, so that for all production orders it will display these rows (in some other variants there can be other filters).

I'm able to read filters from variant, but I cannot find how to get layout filters. This is my starting code:

INITIALIZATION.
  p_syst1 = 'TECO'. "status Closed

START-OF-SELECTION.

      CALL FUNCTION 'RS_VARIANT_CONTENTS'
        EXPORTING
          report               = 'PPIO_ENTRY'
          variant              = 'V1' 
        TABLES
          valutab              = lt_rsparams

"Exclude TECO status
      CLEAR: ls_rsparams.
      LOOP AT lt_rsparams INTO ls_rsparams 
                          WHERE selname = 'P_SYST1'.
        lv_tabix = sy-tabix.
        ls_rsparams-sign = 'E'.
        ls_rsparams-option = 'EQ'.
        ls_rsparams-low = p_syst1.
        MODIFY lt_rsparams FROM ls_rsparams INDEX lv_tabix.
      ENDLOOP.

     lt_parameters[] = lt_rsparams[].

"Prepare only Operation List to read
      ls_tcoa-oper_sel   = abap_true.

      CALL FUNCTION 'COIS_SELECT_PARAMETERS_SET'
        EXPORTING
          it_parameter = lt_parameters
          is_tcoa      = ls_tcoa.       

      CALL FUNCTION 'COIS_SELECT_ORDERS_READ'
        CHANGING
          ct_iooper = lt_iooper.


"Here I need to include filters contained in L1 layout
"to further filter IOOPER table otherwise I get all fields 
"without any filter

      MOVE-CORRESPONDING lt_iooper[] TO lt_out1[].

I tried with the followings snippets without any success:

DATA(lo_variant) = cl_salv_bs_variant=>get_instance( ).
DATA(ls_layout)  TYPE salv_s_layout.

TRY.
    lo_variant->set_report( 'PPIO_ENTRY' ).
    lo_variant->set_layout( 'L1' ).
    ls_layout = lo_variant->read_data( ).
    DATA(lt_filters) = ls_layout-filters.
  CATCH cx_salv_bs_sc_runtime_info INTO DATA(e).
    " Errore nella lettura del layout
ENDTRY.

 And this:

DATA: lt_ltdx TYPE TABLE OF ltdx,
      lv_variant TYPE rlgrap-filename.

SELECT * INTO TABLE lt_ltdx
  FROM ltdx
  WHERE report = 'PPIO_ENTRY'
    AND handle = ''
    AND variant = 'L1'.

IF sy-subrc = 0.
  " Deserialize error
  IMPORT layout = ls_layout
         filters = lt_filter
         FROM DATA ls_ltdx-xlayout ID 'LAY'.

  LOOP AT lt_filter INTO ls_filter.
   
  ENDLOOP.

ENDIF.

In this last case I can't deserialize information from LTDX table and also I don't have any XSTRING or RAW data element in its strucutre, in fact lt_filter is EMPTY.

 

Do you have any clue or advise on this?

I'm in S/4.

Requesting your kind help

thanks

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Migration: From SAP Web IDE (Neo) to BAS (CF)
entry.content:
Hi @ianzheng ,

Thank you for your comment. I’m glad you found the article helpful!

Regarding your query about ABAP destination creation, I currently do not have a specific guide on this topic. However, you can refer to the SAP documentation, which provides detailed guidance for such configurations. Here's a useful resource you might find relevant: https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/destination-examples?locale=en-US#loio3a2d57580d474da6960a644462a92861__http_op

If you have any further questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out.

Best regards,
Santhosh

entry.title: SAP C4C - Badi for Incoming Address Deletion Request
entry.content:
Hi All,

since we have the problem, that Business Partner Adresses cannot be deleted as long as they are used by Contacts I was wondering whether I can reassign another valid address to Contact in order to make the address deletable.

As the data comes in from SAP ERP via CPI, there is no use of a manual process. The SAP ERP is the data source for Business Partners and their adresses. Contacts on the other hand are creatred in C4C and are not replicated to SAP ERP. But they inherit their address from the Business Partner Object.

This leads to error messages like "You are not allowed to delete this address." when a Business Partner gets updated and a address is deleted.

So the idea is to fix this by reassigning the Business Partners new main address to the Contact so deletion is possible. The only point I am missing is: Where can I hook in in the replication process to witness the address deletion before its magic is done.

I already have implemented enhancements in SAP C4C like RecipientSystemDeterminationbyBuinessObject to avoid unwelcomed replication. So I am searching for a similar process to "correct" the address in there.

Kind regards,
Manu

entry.title: Re: SAP Landscape Management Cloud discontinued
entry.content:
@Marco_Dorn How will the stop/start automation be provided (which LAMA is doing perfectly for us on premise) in the cloud, if at all we decide to move to cloud? Do Azure or AWS have a similar feature?

If we decide to stick on premise beyond 2027, can we still use our LAMA for automation till we move to cloud?

entry.title: Re: Iflow HTTP Oauth authentication unsupported grant typ...
Re: #SITCPS2025 O Fim da TAXBRA/RVABRA e a Chegada do TaaS: Tudo o Que Você Precisa Saber
entry.content: Dezen é fera!

entry.title: Re: Secure 2.0 Section 603 Multiple Savings Plans
entry.content:
Hi @Debbie_Moses ,

You're absolutely on point, the core of the issue lies in how the system treats the 457 plan contributions under Section 603. Here's what you can consider:

Marking both the 401(k) and 457 as "Qualified Plans" in V_5UBA_C causes the system to sum EE contributions across both plans which isn't what you want.

What’s happening:

  • 401(k) catch-up is working fine because VV_T5F99K2_US_BN603 is correctly configured.

  • 457 plan is incorrectly triggering catch-up based only on EE contributions, ignoring ER contributions, since it’s not marked as a Qualified Plan  and that flag is what controls the inclusion of ER in the catch-up calculation.

Recommended workaround:

  • Don't mark both plans as Qualified in V_5UBA_C.

  • Instead, create a custom rule or enhancement in the Benefits BAdI (e.g. BADI_FBN_CONTRIBUTION_LIMIT) that handles the 457 plan catch-up separately and Manually includes both EE + ER contributions when applying the $23,500 limit before catch-up.

This lets you: ✔ Keep 401(k) logic intact.
✔ Avoid the system summing contributions incorrectly.
✔ Enforce ER+EE cap for the 457 plan as required.

for SAP Help Reference: Configure Contribution Limits
(Search for Section 603 and catch-up contributions for relevant info)

if this answered your question, please mark the response accordingly. Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance, SAP S/4HANA...
entry.content:
The difference in reporting is that project costs are internally calculated for Customer Projects, but for Enterprise Projects they are uploaded with values only, not quantities.

You will have to develop a custom report to report on quantities on Enterprise Projects.  Enterprise Project cost planning is uploaded (quantities are not available to upload, only values).  You could get plan quantities from Project Demands and then layer in the actual quantities.

entry.title: Re: Iflow HTTP Oauth authentication unsupported grant typ...
entry.content:
Hi,

Maybe you can type a star on fields Scope, Resource and Audience.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Mass creation of Project and WBS element using odata
entry.content:

entry.title: Unable to find field in OData Service Explorer
entry.content: So I've created a custom OData Service for Service Requests and I'm having a hard time finding the 'Category' field. I've tried adding every option I can think of to the service and have been using postman to send payloads with every field filled in but none of them relate to the 'Category' field. I've noticed that the fields in the custom service sometimes differ from the standard service as well so I can't just copy the payload for the standard service that works and use it in the custom service. I'm in the middle of reading a bunch of documentation to see if I can find any answers but does any one have any advice for finding the 'Category' field in the OData Service Explorer so that I can use it in the custom service? TIA.

entry.title: Re: Changing my universal ID from S USER to P USER
entry.content:
@Joerom For Universal ID support, please reach out to our Customer Interaction Center, they can help you: https://support.sap.com/en/contact-us.html?anchorId=section_42886245

They will, however, not be able to help you retrieve your certifications. (I believe)
I therefore recommend you contact SAP Learning support after you have changed your Universal ID: https://learning.sap.com/helpcenter

entry.title: Re: The Transition from SAP GTS 11 to SAP GTS, edition for SAP HANA
entry.content: Can I get the list of FIORI apps available for GTS E4H (SAP HANA 2023) ? In the reference library all the FIORI apps related to GTS are not updated.

entry.title: SAP TM Enhancement Report to check TOR data
entry.content:
SAP TM Enhancement Report to check TOR data

SAP Transportation Management (TM) delivery some standards report to review TM Objects also the BOBF -Business Object Processing Framework, transactions in SAP to check and execute different action within TM objects, i.e one of the previous blog: SAP TM BOPF Navigator -Transaction /SCMTMS/BONAV - SAP Community

The report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR is available in SAP TM to check the TOR data along with some BOBF Nodes in the structure like Item Level, head Level, Stops, BPs, etc.

This report is flexible to execute by User, Range of dates, Document Category, Document Type also with Document Number and Internal Key TM objects.

 

Also, some Technical settings and possible to save as variants:

Once you execute the report you can see the TM Nodes on left side and right side each line related with the TM Documents:

 

For example, like see the BP at FU Level:

This report gives a quickly overview of the TM Nodes and easy navigate through.

Refer to:

3586175 - Enhancement for report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR - SAP for Me

3559480 Enhancements for TOR Check Report
3559026 Enhancement of report to display TOR data
3557888 Abort of Report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3480188 Main Cargo Item flag is set incorrectly
3476950 Self Check Extension
3408472 TOR Self Check Extension
3351482 Extension of report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3342545 Extension of report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3322934 Extend TOR Check Report with Change Document Info
3071406 Wrong data shown within debugger script /SCMTMS/DS_TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3057939 Extension of debugger script /SCMTMS/DS_TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3053162 Missing debugger script to display current TOR data in a readable format

Hope this help you!

Thank you and regards.

Rogerio Lima.

entry.title: Re: Instructor-led with online content - online content "...
entry.content:
Found the issue! 

Both the item and the class had the approval process on it. Once I removed the approval process from the overall item, it worked as expected.

entry.title: Re: TVARVC variables not showing in the variant selection
entry.content:
Honestly I have the same problem, but the "solutions" presented above did not solve my problem!

I have neither the issue, that Tcode STVARVC created the variables "T" of TVARVC table in the Dev -Config client 000, my variables are not created in client 000 instead, they are in the right client, on which we work!

Also this link http://help.sap.com/saphelp_nw70/helpdata/en/c0/980386e58611d194cc00a0c94260a5/frameset.htm did  not help further, as I know how to create variables!

The problem is not solved for me. Unfortunately no one writes the final solutions, once the problems are solved. no one is open to share his insight, as long his problem is solved.

Has someone a solution for this?

entry.title: "no trainer on server checked in" Error with context.html file
entry.content:
I am trying to get my context.html file to function properly, but I keep getting the same error all the time:

{"details":"C6BF0D18-04231701","message":"no trainer on server checked in","message_error_code":"UE_TRAINER_NOT_FOUND","status":400}

All Resources have been saved, published and sync'd and the same trainer version is set as default in both Manager and Producer. 

Any suggestions on how to correct this?

Is there any function/transcation can show two weeks demand for all of my part in one report?

entry.title: Re: SAP BW/4HANA 2023 Now Supports SAP HANA Cloud, Data Lake Relational Engine
entry.content:
Hi @RobertWaywell !

Great news to see this. If I see right the BW/4HANA has to be in the cloud for this scenario?

I wonder how this is connected to the SAP Business Data Cloud scenario. On the one hand, in SAP BDC I have the possibility to bring BW-data to SAP Data Lake, Files in the form of a data product. On the other hand I would love to understand if this possibility is available in SAP BDC, too? I would expect so. So thinking one step further - is a combined scenario possible somehow? Using all the layers in the scenario e. g. like shown before here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/data-management-concepts-and-techniques-in-sap-hana-cloud/ba-p/13523597 ?

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA 2022 FPS1 Fully-Activated Appliance standard installation
entry.content: HANA daemon is not starting after after rename

entry.title: Re: Custom fields not edited in Purchase Requisition API
entry.content: Just in case this is useful for someone, I did find the reason behind of why custom fields weren't updated. Basically, the badi triggered when a purchase requisition is created or modified has a custom logic to fill these custom fields, so when I tried to modified them from an API, my new data was being replaced for the original mapping of the badi.

entry.title: Electronic Bank Reconciliation Mismatch error
entry.content:

what possible solution is there to meet this type of errors.

entry.title: Re: Separate authorization for park and post supplier inv...
entry.content:
Hello, 

There is special application that allows you to park supplier invoice. Please find documntation below:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/2527430934784953a5659106578ca695.html?locale=en-US

Park should also be possible from Create Supplier Invoice app:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/01060a2e758f4e8a9d4a7cf07b0ce323.html?locale=en-US

Reagrds, 

Jagoda Drwiega

entry.title: Re: Asset Accounting (FI-AA) – Insurance values in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: A very comprehensive explanation.  Thank you for sharing your knowledge with the SAP Community.

entry.title: Maintain Determination of Value-Added Tax Registration Number
entry.content:
Dear Team,

When creating a sales order, my client wants that the taxe applicated should be the one of the sold-to party and not the ship to party if they are different. 

I updated the activity "Maintain Determination of Value-Added Tax Registration Number" by adding the letter A for the sales organization. I also read the sap note 872449.

I did my test with an italian customer which has a french ship to party. The tax applicated is the one of the french partner and not the italian despite the update of the activity. 

How can I make the tax determination be the one of the sold to party ? 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Maintain Determination of Value-Added Tax Registratio...
entry.content:
Hello Customer,

As stated in our Public Cloud KBA 0003275376 - TTX1 for export is not determined - S/4HANA Cloud (pretty similar to the note you read from on premise): SAP system will always first check the destination country and then searches for a VAT registration number in this destination country. If there are others VAT registration numbers maintained in the customer master for different countries, system will checked if the tax destination country does not equal the partner country.

So, By default, SAP uses the Ship-To Party’s tax classification in this rule. You might check it here: Session > VAT ID Determination (Customer) > 3308072 - Output tax determination in sales billing - SAP S/4HANA Cloud

I would also might advise to check whether there is a BAdI sd_tax_determination released, if yes, you can write a code to override the logic, for example:

IF is_partner-partner_function = 'AG'. " AG = Sold-To
  es_tax_data-country = is_partner-country.
  es_tax_data-region = is_partner-region.
  ...
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: SAP BW/4HANA 2023 Now Supports SAP HANA Cloud, Data Lake Relational Engine
entry.content:
@pbaumann 

At this time the support is for an on premise BW/4HANA system to use HDLRE in place of on premise SAP IQ for the DTO storage. The RISE/PCE team is looking to certify this architecture for BW/4HANA systems deployed in RISE as well, but that is still work in progress. 

SAP BW/4HANA Data Tiering Optimization ("DTO") serves a different purpose from a data product that is produced from a BW system. DTO is focused on tiering data out of the HANA storage, while keeping the full data set available to be queried through BW. This allows the BW system to keep historic data while reducing TCO compared to keeping all data in HANA. Data products are focused on sharing data with other applications using a well defined format.

entry.title: Re: Customizing Automatic Notification Creation in T350 f...
entry.content: Hi Mike,

entry.title: Re: S4H PUBLIC EVO and EFB parameter IDs
entry.content:
Hello, 

I haven't found anything directly connected to parameters EVO nor EFB, but there is possibility to create default values for user that will apper in PR. See SAP Note 3062458 about it:

https://me.sap.com/notes/3062458/E

Here you will find SAP Note 2613250 about authorisation check:

https://me.sap.com/notes/2613250/E

Its not directly the same, but I hope it will help you to solve your issue.

Best reagrds, 

Jagoda Drwiega

entry.title: I need to copy functionality to the ASR cockpit
entry.content:
Hi, 

In the ASR (Advanced shipping and receiving) cockpit I want to add a button for wave picking. A similar button already exists in the send cockpit. Now, I've been able (with help from colleagues) to add the physical button, but I can't seem to manage to add the functionality from that other button. 
Here's the existing button:

Here's the new button that should react like the button above:

here's the technical details of the new button:

I have added 'COPY' to the button for testing purposes. When I press the + sign I see a list of commands that can be added to the button:

But how can I add this functionality from the button to be copied?

I've read about I might need to implement the feeder class? I think that might be this one:

Does any guru here can tell me if I'm on the right way and know where to go from here?

Many thanks & regards,

Ron.

entry.title: SAP ALM Deep dive workshop - Atlanta, GA
entry.content:
An in-person SAP Cloud ALM Deep Dive Workshop will be held at the SAP office in Atlanta, GA. This full-day workshop is designed for SAP customers and partners interested in strengthening their knowledge and capabilities in SAP Cloud ALM for both implementation and operations.

The agenda includes expert-led sessions, hands-on exercises, and peer networking opportunities—all focused on helping attendees maximize the value of SAP Cloud ALM in their business transformation journey.

Why Attend?

  • Explore the latest features and innovations in SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Participate in hands-on sessions for both implementation and operations scenarios.
  • Gain practical insights into managing cloud and hybrid landscapes using SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Learn how to align your ALM strategy with business goals to support agility and growth.
  • Interact with SAP ALM experts and connect with peers across industries.
  • Complete the onsite assessment to earn the Solution Transformation Consultant Badge, validating your expertise in end-to-end lifecycle management.

    Additional Information

    Attendees are encouraged to bring their own laptops for hands-on exercises and for taking the badge assessment. A dedicated network will be available for use during the sessions.

    Registration : https://go4.events.sap.com/sap-alm-events-na/en_us/home.html

    Participation is free, but subject to approval due to limited seating.

entry.title: Re: get line number at run time
entry.content: It can be useful when refactoring code which populates an internal table at many different locations within a huge procedure with many loops and  conditions and we look at that populated internal table and wonder where exactly the rows have been added without having to use the debugger much.

entry.title: SAP ALM Deep dive workshop - Palo Alto, CA
entry.content:
An in-person SAP Cloud ALM Deep Dive Workshop will be held at the SAP office in Palo Alto, CA. This full-day workshop is designed for SAP customers and partners interested in strengthening their knowledge and capabilities in SAP Cloud ALM for both implementation and operations.

The agenda includes expert-led sessions, hands-on exercises, and peer networking opportunities—all focused on helping attendees maximize the value of SAP Cloud ALM in their business transformation journey.

Why Attend?

  • Explore the latest features and innovations in SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Participate in hands-on sessions for both implementation and operations scenarios.
  • Gain practical insights into managing cloud and hybrid landscapes using SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Learn how to align your ALM strategy with business goals to support agility and growth.
  • Interact with SAP ALM experts and connect with peers across industries.
  • Complete the onsite assessment to earn the Solution Transformation Consultant Badge, validating your expertise in end-to-end lifecycle management.

    Additional Information

    Attendees are encouraged to bring their own laptops for hands-on exercises and for taking the badge assessment. A dedicated network will be available for use during the sessions.

    Registration : https://go4.events.sap.com/sap-alm-events-na/en_us/home.html

    Participation is free, but subject to approval due to limited seating.

entry.title: Cascading budget report for the spend on the entire population.
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a way to get a spend report or any reports for Cascading Budgets. Except for the "export" that shows who receives a budget or the rollup, am not seeing anything. It does not work in Executive Review if the employee is not the planner and the Comp Team needs to have an overll view of spend and by planner.

Thanks,

pbrandi

entry.title: SAP ALM Deep dive workshop - Newtown Square, PA
entry.content:
An in-person SAP Cloud ALM Deep Dive Workshop will be held at the SAP office in Newtown Square, PA. This full-day workshop is designed for SAP customers and partners interested in strengthening their knowledge and capabilities in SAP Cloud ALM for both implementation and operations.

The agenda includes expert-led sessions, hands-on exercises, and peer networking opportunities—all focused on helping attendees maximize the value of SAP Cloud ALM in their business transformation journey.

Why Attend?

  • Explore the latest features and innovations in SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Participate in hands-on sessions for both implementation and operations scenarios.
  • Gain practical insights into managing cloud and hybrid landscapes using SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Learn how to align your ALM strategy with business goals to support agility and growth.
  • Interact with SAP ALM experts and connect with peers across industries.
  • Complete the onsite assessment to earn the Solution Transformation Consultant Badge, validating your expertise in end-to-end lifecycle management.

    Additional Information

    Attendees are encouraged to bring their own laptops for hands-on exercises and for taking the badge assessment. A dedicated network will be available for use during the sessions.

    Registration : https://go4.events.sap.com/sap-alm-events-na/en_us/home.html

    Participation is free, but subject to approval due to limited seating.

entry.title: Re: Customizing Automatic Notification Creation in T350 f...
entry.content: Have you enabled 'Define Notification and Order Integration' Configuration?

entry.title: Re: S4/HANA Business Objects for modules
entry.content:
Hello, 

Check SAP Process Navigator:

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/globalSearch?sIsFrom=BusinessProcess&sId=&name=&sSSId=

You will find here business processes that are available in SAP. You will also find here Best Practises for SAP processes.

Hope it will help.

Jagoda Drwiega

entry.title: How to extract MBC Bank Statement file data from SAP S4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How can we extract the Bank statements received into SAP S4 HANA Public cloud system from Bank via MBC connectivity . and send the same bank statements in CAMT.053 format to another external system?

 

Is this possible on especially on SAP S4 HANA public cloud system?

Please share the related blogs or articles.

SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition connector for SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity

entry.title: Re: EWM Outbound delivery - how to update a custom status...
entry.content:
@Ajit_RoutrayThanks so much for a response! Unfortunately, that method only allows to set few specific statuses.

Documentation for the method says:

"You can set the following status for an outbound delivery:

Status Type Transit Status (DOY): Values In Yard (-) and Out of Yard (X)"

Just in case that was incorrect, I did try to use it with Z... status and found that it ends in a method that checks an internal table with specific statuses and an exception is raised if the status passed is not found there. Just in case someone else runs into this, here is a screenshot from debugger showing the specific allowed statuses and the code location.

entry.title: Re: SAP API Management - How to create a Cloud Integration Flow API Provider
entry.content: Insightful!! especially around authentication challenges which are critical and often tricky part of integrations. Thank you for sharing.

entry.title: Re: XML for Adobe Master template
entry.content: 6 years later after the question, is anyone know if SAP has did any progress on that subject? Now that SAP public cloud is more and more present, the #&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&# still have not evolved. Is anyone has an idea if SAP will do something to provide more supports?

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create hierarchy variables in Datas...
entry.content:
Hey,

You can do it by example by defining hierarchy in the dimension first:

Using dimension in the Analytical Model will give You option to render data in hierarchy + filter based on that.

 

Usefully links:

https://developers.sap.com/group.data-warehouse-cloud-hierarchies.html

https://www.reyemsaibot.com/2024/02/28/sap-datasphere-hierarchies-like-in-sap-bw/

entry.title: Multi-Language Backend Messages in BTP MDK
entry.content:
We have created an Android MDK with multiple languages.  The application is working perfectly with the different languages based on the devices set language.

Device Language setting:

MDK Application Menu:

When logging into SAP via the Logon Pad, my language is set in the Logon Options and then when logging into SAP via GUI, my language is set properly.

SAP transaction text is all French:

When the Online and Offline services are initialized I am not seeing the accept-language in the HTTP headers and my SY-LANGU is set to E.

How can I get properly translated data without the logon language being correct during the initialization of my Offline datastore?

I am seeing the accept-language header parameter when I perform a Function Import call, but my SY-LANGU is still set to E, so I am not getting my error messages back in the proper language.

I would not expect to have to translate the backend messages being returned, I expect the messages to be in the language that the device and MDK application are using.

I am hoping someone can let me know how to get the SY-LANGU set from the MDK language.

entry.title: Re: How do I update the replication flow to update local table in Datasphere ?
entry.content: Do you have some trouble with that? You should be able to updated local table structure + replication flow. Let us know if You have an error or issue with that.

entry.title: how to extract End of life information with SID and extended maintenance details in solution manager
entry.content:
How to extract end of life and extended maintenance information along with SID and Product information from Solman


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: how to extract End of life information with SID and e...
entry.content:
To generate a report with End of Maintenance information for the installed product and system SID on Solution Manager, follow these steps:

  1. Open the LMDB
  2. Under Related Links, click on Landscape Reporting
  3. Select relevant report: "Technical Systems - Installed Product Versions"
  4. Once report is displayed, you can Export to save the report to a local Microsoft Excel spreadsheet

Related documentation:
* KBA 2587065 - How to generate system landscape information from the LMDB - SAP Solution Manager
* https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/c413647f87a54db59d18cb074ce3dafd/211d7c510ef0dd0de10000000a441470.html

Regards,
Debora

entry.title: [Partner Edition] SAP ALM Deep Dive Workshop - Chicago, IL
entry.content:
Why Should Partners Attend?

This full-day event is meticulously designed to offer you valuable insights and practical experience in managing operations and implementations using SAP Cloud ALM. Through interactive sessions and activities, you'll gain a comprehensive understanding of how to leverage SAP Cloud ALM to drive business transformation and enhance operational efficiency. Secure your spot today and get ready to transform your RISE and GROW journey with SAP Cloud ALM!

Event Highlights:

  1. Develop a Robust ALM Strategy: Discover the importance of a solid Application Lifecycle Management strategy in driving your clients' business growth and enhancing agility.
  2. Master SAP Cloud ALM: Acquire in-depth knowledge of SAP Cloud ALM's functionalities and its pivotal role in managing intelligent cloud and hybrid business landscapes.
  3. Enhance Implementation Skills: Participate in hands-on sessions focused on bolstering your implementation and operational expertise. These practical exercises are designed to empower you to deliver superior outcomes and maximum value for your clients.
  4. Interactive Networking: Engage with SAP ALM experts during interactive sessions. This event provides an excellent opportunity to network with fellow partners and industry peers, facilitating a dynamic exchange of insights, experiences, and strategic approaches.
  5. Guidance for Transition to SAP Cloud ALM: Uncover effective strategies to assist your customers in smoothly transitioning to SAP Cloud ALM, ensuring they leverage its full capabilities.
  6. Achieve Accreditation: Elevate your expertise by earning the Solution Transformation Consultant Badge to showcase your proficiency in managing the design to deploy phase of business transformations, utilizing an integrated and comprehensive toolchain approach.

Who should attend this workshop:

  • Project delivery Leads, Consultants, Project Managers, ALM Experts, Test Managers, GROW & RISE Sales, and Presales advisors

Please Note:

We encourage all attendees to bring their own laptops to the workshop. This will allow you to fully participate in the hands-on sessions and engage with the interactive activities designed to enhance your understanding of SAP Cloud ALM. To ensure a smooth and effective learning experience, a dedicated network will be provided for your convenience. This network will support your participation in both the practical exercises and the Solution Transformation Consultant Badge test.

Participation is free at this limited seat event : REGISTER NOW

For any further queries please contact us on sapalmus@sap.com

Regards,

ALM Go-To-Market Americas

This full-day event is meticulously designed to offer you valuable insights and practical experience in managing operations and implementations using SAP Cloud ALM. We encourage all attendees to bring their own laptops to the workshop. This network will support your participation in both the practical exercises and the Solution Transformation Consultant Badge test.

Participation is free at this limited seat event : REGISTER NOW

For any further queries please contact us on sapalmus@sap.com

entry.title: Re: EWM Outbound delivery - how to update a custom status value?
entry.content: Additionally, I've also looked at the interface /SCDL/IF_AF_STATUS_MANAGEMENT because the name sounded promising. There is no documentation for it in SE24 but it is used in a report /SCWM/POST_PROC_DLV_SET_DOY, so I looked there for an example. The problem with this option is that it has "Activity" as a mandatory parameter and it is not relevant (or even available) in my case.

entry.title: Re: Universal Parallel Accounting - limitations and opportunities
entry.content: Thanks for sharing this summary on UPA.

entry.title: Re: How to Set up email notification to be sent to requisitioner when PO is approved in PO workflow
entry.content: Hi Mohammed945, It may depent of your S4HANA version, in OnPremise in transaction SWDD_SCENARIO, has your workflow any entry in Outcomes

entry.title: Work Items in Customer Projects and Line Items in General Ledger
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

We are using Work Items within Work Packages in Customer Projects to segregate the team's work across different work packages. 

We would like to see this information reflected in the General Ledger. In the app "Display Line Items in General Ledger", there is a column option for Work Item ID, but this information does not appear in the GL line items. 

Could you please clarify if the Work Item ID from Customer Projects should be reflected in the GL? Or is this field related to another functionality?

If it should be populated from Customer Projects, could you please guide me on how to configure the system so that this information appears in the GL line items? 

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: SAP B1: Duplicated Windows in ALT+TAB
entry.content: I am experiencing the same issue... Windows 11 Enterprise 24H2 Exp. Pack: 1000.26100.66.0

entry.title: Re: EWM Outbound delivery - how to update a custom status value?
entry.content: Activity used in standard as status_type && status_value (ZDOBX as example) maybe it works this way

entry.title: Re: Data Binding - Odata Navigation is empty
entry.content: Hi Jochen,

entry.title: Monitor S.O. vs outbound delivery number
entry.content:
Hello all,

"We are going live in S4H/C on May 1, and during the hyper care period, I am looking for an app or another way to create an overview of the sales order numbers and outbound delivery numbers at a glance. Ideally, I would prefer to use the confirmed delivery date as a filter. This way, we can see which orders are planned for specific days based on the outbound delivery number."

Please share your'e knowledge with me

entry.title: Re: Data Binding - Odata Navigation is empty
entry.content:
Hi Jochen,

 

If your issue is on the OData collection* of the tab: Template customization when creating a new project on SAP Web IDE for ABAP component version 7.4, if the dropdown is empty, this is due to not having any of your entity sets marked as addressable on the SEGW Odata service. Please mark one of those as addressable and it will appear.

 

KR,

Manu.

entry.title: Blog series on my CPI + Camel learning journey - Part7 - Transporting packages
entry.content:
In this one we are going to talk about serious things, so I'd really appreciate being challenged on assumptions I make here or solutions I suggest.

Most probably someone might know better why it should not be done this way.

Anyway use it all at your own risk (if you somehow read this and decide to give it a try).

Link back to index: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/blog-series-on-my-cpi-camel-learning-journey/ba-p/14031053

About property placeholders in Camel and CPI

As we need to have some camel stuff in each post, we will start with property placeholders.

You might ask why? And the reason is the assumption I made based on my expectations of how cpi works with properties (externalized parameters) made me re-implement stuff after the assumption was proven wrong.

So, in short, what are property placeholders and how they are potentially related to transporting of our artifacts?

Well, as documentation states "Property placeholders are used to define a placeholder instead of the actual value. This is important as you would want to be able to make your applications external configurable, such as values for network addresses, port numbers, authentication credentials, login tokens, and configuration in general."

That might sound familiar to externalized parameters we have in CPI, and even the double curly brace syntax is the same.

But there is a big catch.

In camel there is this Properties Component that deals with .properties files that act as source of those placeholders.

And imagine if we could just have some props files for DEV, QA and PROD and then include them in our camelContext dynamically via env variable that karaf gets from OS (or as JVM property) or defines itself.

Maybe even looking like this:

But it does not look like this, because CPI does NOT use properties component (therefore I did not bother actually testing this so cannot 100% guarantee that this is correct syntax).

Instead we have some separate something exposed via api and also as Externalize + Configure uis.

So in actual blueprints we are not going to find {{my_externalized_property}} expressions, but rather actual parameters that were substituted during the "compile time" (in .iflw artifacts in src we CAN see it though).

And that almost fatal assumption I made was based on the fact that we actually still somehow DO have parameters.prop file and its counterpart parameters.propdef in our repo.

For example, here it is for aforementioned content_enricher_json we covered last time (which in turn was a copy of content_enricher I made from the guidelines example)

And it looks like this (what's up Dude? 😉 )

Why it matters?  Well, because in this file for some reason we see some properties that are not even used in iflow.

And even though the creation date in header is current (the date when I copied it from the guidelines sample), the content is actually coming from that original iflow.

How come? Well, those are default values we configured in ui.

And not only that - each time we create an externalized token it is instantly created in this "Configuration service" and kept there forever (unless you manually clean it up and rezip the artifact). And this explains why the Dude is still with us even if the author of that iflow just accidentally created it.

So first of all that means be careful with what you can possibly expose in your code if you use git to sync your design-time artifacts.

And then there was this wrong assumption I made, that those were current values "dumped" to prop file during "compilation".

Later I discovered that we also have externalconfig.prop in src folder that indeed has the value that was configured in UI, but it looked liked it was ignored during subsequent import/rezip.

 

About mtars and Content Agent Service

My grand-grandfather used to tell me when I was a kid: "Don't you dare to touch the PROD with your dirty hands! Keep everything in code and only deploy the artifacts via CI/CD so that you control the state PROD is in!"

What I mean by that is as developers we want to make sure our stuff works before it even leaves DEV. And once it does, everything else happens automatically.

And this is exactly the reason why this wrong assumption I made was so important: I wanted prepare all the design-time artifacts in my DEV environment and then just deploy it in PROD (maybe even without manual intervention).

And now we need to talk a little bit about mtars which stand for MultiTARget applications.

Mtars

In BTP those were first-class citizens even in Neo times (it wasn't obviously event called Neo back then).

And in CF they were also introduced as there was just an application concept (you might probably find some examples of single apps deployed via cf push having simple manifest.yml) 

But the point of mtar is to define the container for more than one application (module as they call it), resources and services those modules need, and relations between the modules (provide/require).

For example, this is sap cap documentation regarding mtars which leads to another one leading to help (and probably I will do one the next blog parts covering "cloudification of mpl app" where we will of course need to build and deploy our mtar to btp).

The most important point here is that if we have code locally, we can just use mbt tool (they point to at first link) to get us the mtar file.

And back to those Camel properties files I mentioned earlier - it would be super cool if we were able to just build ourselves mtar for our package locally or in CI/CD pipeline because we would have everything in git.

And then we would simply do the same stuff as we typically do in cap - cf deploy (it is a cf plugin to deal with mtars in cloud foundry environment)

The only problem is - we cannot do that... Because we need to have proper mta descriptor (and maybe even some build scripts) to tell mbt how to build the mtar for us.

Cas

I discovered this guy while trying to setup mtar download option for CPI - obviously I was curious to see what was in there and whether I could just deploy it and maybe even build one myself (like I described above).

Basically, if you are trying to setup CTMS (or just mtar export) you would find blogs (like this or that) or just  sap help docs telling you to create an instance of this guy with "standard" plan and then to create a couple of destinations so that CPI and CAS (and TMS) can talk to each other.

For mtar download you'll just need to create CloudIntegration (CAS talks to CPI) and ContentAssemblyService (CPI talks to CAS)

And indeed it works, although it looks like sometimes BTP UI incorrectly saves destination params, so make sure you enter token url first and then clientSecret - at least it was what finally helped me to get it working in trial tenant (when at some point it cleared the secret after I changed tokenurl).

But there's something else: the "free" plan (as subscription) giving you access to the nice UI to import/export packages (and even separate iflows as mtars) and "application" plan that allows, well, using the apis to perform import/export programmatically (I cheated a little bit and used UI to trace requests/responses which seem to be the same ).

For this we only need CloudIntegration destination (to be able to pull/push data).

Failure and analysis

Now, finally, back to my assumption:

  • I hoped that I could implement some UI in my capic tool to do "mass-change" of externalized parameters (via api) based on props file in my repo (locally where capic is being run) and then export mtar via CAS so that it has the parameters in prop file.
  • So that later I (or some other responsible person cuz we DONT want to give developers access to PROD, remember?) can just import it using this nice CAS UI where ALL the imports could be later traced/audited.

And that was looking almost pro-code enough to me...

Except for the fact that assumption was wrong, so after I implemented all that stuff I found my mtar was exported with just those default values, and not the configured ones I applied...

And indeed, after I checked the documentation for Iflow download option with "Merged Configured and Default Values" it became clear that my Camel-inspired pro-code assumption was wrong and it clearly was just either exporting it as it was (original default values) or "dumping" the current ones into that parameters.prop file we discovered earlier.

"Merged Configured and Default Values: Downloads the integration flow with values that consists of configured and default values. This option would replace the default value with the configured value and accept it as a new default value"

Some inner mtar details

And at that point I felt like I was doomed, because in order to to have the flow I envisioned I would have to reverse engineer the mtar build process for a package (and even though it is just a zip with zipped iflows, there is this magic base64 encoded json resources.cnt file and also hash file with some content hashes).

The mtad.yaml (the deployment descriptor that is used during the deployment of mtar) is actually rather simple, and most surprisingly it was only using the well-known "SAP Process Integration Runtime" service instance:

In other words, when CF deployment service gets this mtar file, it checks if there is "it-rt" service with plan "api" with this particular name "process_integration_transport_instance" created, then creates it automatically with proper role "WorkspacePackagesTransport" if not, and then (I guess) just pushes the design-time content there to be processed (imported).

Also as we actually don't see any runtime modules here (like of type nodejs or java) you can think of this mtar of something similar to html5 repository content module (where our ui5 apps go in managed approuter scenario).

And indeed, like I mentioned in teaser, you can just do cf deploy it to any tenant you want (iirc you must have space developer role in CF assigned to you).

About resourceIds

There is one more thing to notice here: resourceIds ARE important (for whatever reason SAP decided to make life harder for design-time artifacts), and in the base64 encoded resources.cnt file there is a relation between parent (package, whose resourceId IS exposed via public api) and children whose resourceId's are only visible in workspace (or in cas contentResources endpoint), so creating those this files locally would be a pain in the back.

So changing those ids by deleting and re-creating iflows might not be a good idea if "actual/technical id" stays the same (see UniquenessViolationException case below).

 

What are the options though?

Well, I guess I figured out an approach that I am about to try applying at my current project.

In case I can only have default values in my mtar, those MUST be configured for PROD already.

Meaning, at some point when I am ready to transport stuff to PROD I might want to rezip the iflow to get rid of those "Dude credentials" (incorrect or obsolete externalised values), and then properly configure the default properties in that Externalisation UI we have in CPI.

Afterwards I can generate myself the mtar file and deploy it the way I want (cicd cf deploy, manual cas ui, sem-manual tms).

Some things to consider:

  1. As soon as someone configures any parameter in PROD cpi ui, it will take precedence over default ones in mtar.
  2. I still need to manually deploy artifacts one by one in PROD (yeah.. this is so-very-low-code, Dude)
  3. If I rezip (or just manually delete/recreate) any iflow, it will get new resourceId, so I will have a UniquenessViolationException error in PROD system (which I will show in demo, also this snote says something about it)

BTW you can even generate mtar for pre-packaged content (both via CPI ui and programmatically), but in case you transport it like that according to this note it will become marked as modified (meaning chargeable by sap)

 

Stuff implemented in capic tool

In the tool I initially developed a "Transport" dialog where you would mass-apply the parameters from local prop file (DEV, QA, PROD) - to prepare mtar and then revert it back.

But after I discovered it will not work like that and the only option I have is to deal with default values, I decided that the UI/UX can still can be somewhat the same.

Except for the fact that we are NOT going to have the PROD prop file - instead it is going to be that "parametes.prop" (I refer to it as "defaults" target) so that you could compare the parameters to "current" ones.

And also in case we have DEV/QA in one tenant it could still be useful to not have copies of same iflows to test

Maybe later I will also add some autocommit/tag feature for mtar so that ci/cd hooks could be setup for deployment on push to remote (meaning mtar is going to be a part of repo rather than being built with mbt in pipeline).

Basically it looks like this, but I will show how it all works in the demo.

Currently there is no ui in capic setup app to configure cas service, but if you got this far, it should be rather trivial to get yourself an instance of it with "application" plan, then create a service key, and set parameters in .cdsrc.json next to "cpi" and "iflow" (don't forget "/oaut/token" though)

Demo part

We are going to play with our old friend Basics_Exception_Subprocess:

  • We will rezip it with Common_Generic_Receiver and basics_scripts and make export_v1.mtar
  • Then we will change End event to Error and make export_v2.mtar
  • Then we will rezip it again to revert to End and to get new resourceId and make export_rz.mtar
  • After that we will delete the package and try deploying mtars (export_v1 -> export_rz -> export_v2) via cf deploy and cas ui (as if it was PROD) and see what happens

I apologise as I it is not the best demo I could have done, but this part took too much time to make so we have here the first and the only take I made rather late at night.

00:00 Intro and scope of demo

02:27 Setup and prerequisites

Part1 Prepare mtars for "prod"

04:19 Prepare and deploy artifacts

05:51 Changes in Basics_Exception_Subprocess iflow - externalized odata $format parameter // this parameter will act as system-specific setting like urls for dev/prod

07:37 About Transport dialog, parameters and mtar generation

10:09 generate export_v1.mtar with End event

11:41 Change iflow to Error event

14:14 Test and generate export_v2.mtar

15:03 Introduce a resourceId conflict by rezipping the iflow with End event again from git

16:03 Forget I pressed rezip and spend 2 minutes figuring out what happenned

17:34 Deploy v1.0.0 and apply DEV params

22:24 Test json and generate export_rz.mtar

Part2 Deploy mtars to "prod"

23:28 Delete package (only design-time) and explain motivation for using mtars

26:32 Actual cf deploy of export_v1.mtar (but have old runtime artifact still running in "prod")

28:57 Very-low-code manual deployment of prod artifacts

30:50 I messed up and wasted 2 minutes, but package Version attribute actually was there in the v2 resources, but it was 1.0.1 rather than 1.1.0 I failed to find 🙂

32:45 Test v1 and try deploying export_rz.mtar that fails (also show cf mta-ops and cf deploy abort)

35:18 Compare resourceIds between mtar versions

36:15 Deploy export_v2.mtar via cf deploy and then deploy iflow (deploy is used 4 times in this sentence)

40:35 Wasted 3 more minutes

43:04 Delete package again and deploy all three mtars via CAS UI

46:59 Outro

entry.title: Re: Best practice: Boost your process information level using attributes
entry.content:
Thanks for this question!

Better approach: I would take instead SAP Reference User's.

Cheers Thomas

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay search user options missing
entry.content: Hi Xavier, if this "issue" comes up again heres the fix: in "provisioning ->company settings" just uncheck "Enable Assigner Based Functionality."... Not sure why but this was activated

entry.title: Treating Business Goals as "Individual" Goals possible?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am a little bit confused and need your expertise.

For Variable Pay we would like to use Business Goals to be "treated" as Individual Goals, meaning depending on an employees achievment the business goal should deliver different results. [The achievement/result of that Employee can be stored in EC (VP will be EC integrated).]

Example:

Employee A has Business Goal of 1500 Hours and achieved 1500 which equals 100 % payout

Employee B has Business Goal of 1500 and achieved 1600 which equals 150%

Important: In this case each Employee only has 1 Business Goal. 

Is this possible to be achieved and if so, how can this be done?

I already tried to test a little bit with creating different bonus plans and its eligibility but did not get very far. But from my understanding this "could" be possible, right?

If this is not possible, can you maybe help me out with a different approach?

Thank you!

Michael

entry.title: Re: EWM Outbound delivery - how to update a custom status value?
entry.content: @Daniil I like your thinking 🙂 but Activity is only 4 characters, so it can't be as simple as ZDOBX, alas.

entry.title: Store text in clipboard functionally in SAP RAP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'm wondering how to store text in the clipboard so i'll be able to paste it(CTRL+V) directly.
I came across CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES=>CLIPBOARD_EXPORT but i think it will not work since this method depends on SAP GUI.

Any suggestions ?

entry.title: Re: 1H 2025 Product Release: Add a Note, View Notes, etc...
entry.content: Neither of those KBAs show me where do Managers and Employees view their Notes in the new Full Profile?

entry.title: Onboarding DRTM I-9 Form retention
entry.content: Using the Onboarding DRTM feature, is it possible to set up I9 form data retention rules based on termination dates, according to the USCIS requirements?

entry.title: Re: LRN-167172-1H 2025 Product Release
entry.content: @Abhishek_Kr, looking at the 1H 2025 list of known issues (KBA 2692971), the scenario that was described doesn't stand to be part of it. Please, consider opening a case to review it, as it stands to require a deeper analysis to understand what's happening, and avoid sharing system details in the posts, like the login URL.

entry.title: Re: LRN-167172- 1H 2025 Product Release- reminder mail issue
entry.content: @Abhishek_Kr, the the 1H 2025 list of known issues (KBA 2692971) doesn't stand to have anything similar to your scenario. Please, consider opening a case to review it, as it stands to require a deeper analysis to understand what's happening.

entry.title: Re: Setting up the configuration of the ABAP Cloud in SAP Build
entry.content:
Hi @Nesreen ,
I have the same configuration if I load
System ID: D01
System Client: 100
but the package combo box doesn't show anything and I have multiple Z packages.

Do you know what could be missing here?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to extract MBC Bank Statement file data from SAP...
entry.content:
Hello @munipkumar 

Yes, it is possible, but there are some necessary clarifications.

Step-by-Step Solution:

1. Bank Statement Integration via MBC (Inbound to SAP):

Bank statements in CAMT.053 format are received via SAP MBC and integrated into the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud through the Bank Communication Management (BCM) and Electronic Bank Statement (EBS) processes.

The statements are stored in the Manage Incoming Bank Statements App (F1829) for reconciliation.

SAP Help Reference:
SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity 

2. Access and Extract CAMT.053 Files:

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud does not allow direct access to raw XML CAMT.053 files post-import via the standard UI.

Alternative Option:
Store the original CAMT.053 file in an external middleware (e.g., SAP BTP Integration Suite, CPI) before the inbound call to SAP. This allows for dual delivery:
One to SAP via MBC.
One to your external system.

Electronic Bank Statement Integration in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

3. Forwarding to External System:
Use SAP Integration Suite or SAP Event Mesh:

Set up a pre-processing interface to intercept or clone the CAMT.053 file.

From there, push the file to the external system (e.g., via SFTP or REST API).
This ensures the CAMT.053 XML format is preserved before being consumed by SAP.

SAP Tools & Components to Use:
⠀Component Purpose
SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity Securely receive CAMT.053 bank statements
Bank Communication Management Monitor statement flow
Manage Incoming Bank Statements View & reconcile EBS
SAP Integration Suite (CPI) Forward CAMT.053 to third-party system

Related SAP Resources:
Bank Statement APIs – SAP API Hub

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Errors in Onboarding 2.0 trying to add or update documents
entry.content:
Hi,

We are in the midst of our implementation project to migrate from Onboarding 1.0 to 2.0. As soon as this latest software release went into my preview Test instance (all was working just fine the Friday prior), my implementation consultant is now getting errors when trying to add or update an existing document.

  • Scenario 1- When I click on a document, I get the error: Document Template Preview could not be loaded 
  • Scenario 2: When I try to import a new document, I get the error: ChangeSet index 1 - ???HCP Error Message: Http Status Code 401???;File could not be updated in PFS 

Ticket was created (436039/2025), and I needed to escalate this today to high priority as we are now at a stand still as Support is not helping at all. This may impact our planned go-live date. 

Are any other customers seeing errors like this? 

~Julie

entry.title: Re: Credit memo for Inter-company billing
entry.content: There is actually another blog with this same issue and resolution.  I had the same issue but here is the solution.  All you need to do is add an entry in the 'Screen Sequence Group' field (TVAP-POSGR) of the IC item category (NLC in standard).  By default SAP does not assign a screen seq because it is usually only used for IC billing and not orders.

entry.title: How can I undeploy a specific field from a table in SAP HANA?
entry.content:
We are developing CAP Java application and in our entity definition(see below) we are using the @SAP/cds/common/#aspect-managed to auto-manage audit fields (createdBy, modifiedAt, modifiedBy, etc.).

Since managed aspect automatically add audit fields and these fields have already been deployed to SAP HANA, so they exist in the database BUT now we want to undeploy certain fields (e.g., createdBy, modifiedAt, modifiedBy) while keeping createdAt? 

What is the best way to undeploy specific fields from table? 

 

using { managed } from '@sap/cds/common';
 
entity CustomerContracts : managed {
key owner : Association to CustomersAssigned;
};

entry.title: Service Quotation in SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Good afternoon

Please your help.

Is there an application that can be used to make a flexible analyse of the service quotations?

Where it shows the service order to which is link and the equipment.

#SAPS4HANACLOUDPUBLICEDITION

#SERVICE QUOTATION

#FLEXIBLEANALYSIS

entry.title: How do I release a material that is in QI without an Inspection lot
entry.content:
Someone selected 'Post to stock' in the material master without identifying the inspection type. When a material was transported with a 101 movement, it went into Quality. Since there is not an inspection lot associated, I get an error "Change the inspection stock of material xxxx in QM only" when doing a 321. I was able to uncheck post to stock and save in the MM, but that does not allow me to release it still. I cannot use QA32, QA11 or QE51N. I have asked the user to reverse the GR but since it was completed in a previous month there is no guarantee that the system will allow  a reversal.

Any ideas?

entry.title: Re: Service Quotation in SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello @Melissa_Pineda 

Thank you for your question.

Yes, in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you can utilise the “Service Quotation Items - Analytical List Page (F6459)” app to conduct flexible analyses of service quotations. This app enables you to:

  • Analyse service quotations by various attributes (e.g., status, quotation type, service team).
  • View linked service orders and associated equipment (provided the data is maintained accurately in the service documents).
  • Apply filters and create visual dashboards for real-time insights.

For a more detailed breakdown, including relationships to service orders and equipment, you may also consider a custom CDS view or analytical query using the Custom Analytical Queries (Fiori app F1602), where you can join quotation, order, and equipment tables if the standard apps do not provide the full context.

Please let me know if you need further assistance

Best regards,
Chuma

entry.title: Re: Need CDS view for customer Project Actual cost and Bi...
entry.content:
Dear @vigneshvalluvan1989 

Thank you for your message.

To support your CDS view development for the customer project overview in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, please find below the recommended standard CDS views that include the fields you mentioned:

Field Name

Standard CDS View

Actual Effort (Hours)

I_TimeSheetRecord

Actual Cost

I_ActualCostLineItem

Billed

I_BillingDocumentItem

Unbilled

I_ProjectBillingElement

Billing Method

I_CustomerProject

Please note:

  • Some CDS views may have restricted access in the Custom CDS Views app.
  • In such cases, you can use the Custom Analytical Queries app for reporting purposes.
  • If the fields remain unavailable, I recommend raising a support incident or requesting access via SAP Extensibility options.

 Here are two useful references for your configuration:

SAP Help Portal – Custom CDS Views

SAP Learning – CDS Views in S/4HANA Cloud

Should you need further assistance, feel free to reach out.

Best regards,

Chuma

entry.title: SAC Story breaks when Datasphere model is updated
entry.content:
Hello

We have created a Datasphere analytic model with a live connection to SAC, and have created several Stories using this model. 

Recently we've added one new measure and one new dimension to the Datasphere model.  Nothing else was changed in Datasphere, but when subsequently running our Stories, most of the Story filters failed with the following message.  

In addition, numerous measures that we created in the Story have failed since those measures used those same dimensions that are no longer available.

Can anyone help with what happened here?  It would seem like a major issue if any Datasphere updates results in us needing to essentially recreate our existing Stories. 

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Re: Bringing Apps Onto SAP Fiori Launchpad - SAP S/4HANA User Experience
entry.content:
Hello Costiantyn,
good news: yes, there is a tool for migrating technical catalogs created with Launchpad Designer to technical catalogs that can be managed with Launchpad App Manager. You can find a how-to description in the blog post SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Technical Catalog Migr... - SAP Community by Jocelyn Dart.
best regards
Ruth

entry.title: Re: Setup Fund Management in SAP Public Cloud Grow Step b...
entry.content:
Hello @iRzSAP 

Thank you for your question.

To implement SAP Funds Management (FM) in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (GROW), please note that FM is not available as a standard scope item in the Public Cloud Edition. It is only supported in SAP S/4HANA on-premises and Private Cloud Edition.

What to check:

  1. Confirm Edition – Verify if you are on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (GROW). If so, FM functionality is not supported.
  2. Alternative Approach – For budgeting and cost control in Public Cloud, consider using:
  • Cost Center Budgeting (via app: Manage Cost Center Budgets)
  • Availability Control for cost elements
  • Project System (PS) for investment tracking

Refer to SAP Help Portal:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Budget Availability Control

If FM is a critical requirement, a move to Private Cloud Edition may be necessary.

Let me know if you'd like further information

Best regards,

Chuma
